subject: Fix #17-A — Cross-partition REST×REST mutex (issue #3)
description: Fix #17-A confirmed working. PLAN-20260423113820: zero CT×RT overlaps (vs 1 in prior probe). Constraint 8 (REST×REST cross-partition mutex) firing as expected with 556+92+702 blocks on P2/P3/P4 respectively. P0 INFEASIBLE and midnight-only anchors are separate issues (tasks #87, #88).
